name: TimeSelectionCriteriaParameterClass
title: Time Selection Criteria Parameter Class Codes (2.9.1 - 1.1.1)
description: Code system of concepts used to describe acceptable start and end times, as well as days of the week, for appointment or resource scheduling.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the SCV and APR segments.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: An indicator that Friday is or is not preferred for the day on which the appointment will occur.
concept.definition: An indicator that Friday is or is not preferred for the day on which the appointment will occur.

property.valueString:
In component 2, specify OK or NO.

OK = Preferred appointment day NO = Day is not preferred

concept.display: An indicator that Monday is or is not preferred for the day on which the appointment will occur.
concept.definition: An indicator that Monday is or is not preferred for the day on which the appointment will occur.

property.valueString:
In component 2, specify OK or NO.

OK = Preferred appointment day NO = Day is not preferred

concept.display: An indicator that there is a preferred end time for the appointment request, service or resource.
concept.definition: An indicator that there is a preferred end time for the appointment request, service or resource.

property.valueString: In component 2, specify any valid time in the format HHMM, using 24-hour clock notation where HH = hour and MM = minutes

concept.display: An indicator that there is a preferred start time for the appointment request, service or resource.
concept.definition: An indicator that there is a preferred start time for the appointment request, service or resource.

property.valueString: In component 2, specify any valid time in the format HHMM, using 24-hour clock notation where HH = hour and MM = minutes
